comments: Richard Skinner sits in for Tommy, who is "away"
Skinner plays some comedy voice over the top of 'Take It Off The Top'; sacrilege!

sessions.details: First broadcast of session recorded 16th April 1982. Reuben Archer (vocals), Laurence Archer (guitar), Alan Wilson (keyboards), Colin Bond (bass), Frank Noon (drums). No commercial release known.
